name: Event-Driven Integration
strategicIntent: Establish a publish/subscribe event-driven architecture with durable messaging, dead-letter queues, and idempotency guarantees to decouple services and enable real-time data flows across McCain's supply chain and manufacturing systems.
problemStatement: Point-to-point synchronous integrations between supply chain, ERP, and manufacturing systems create tight coupling, cascading failures during peak order periods, and inability to process events at different rates across global regions.

useCases.use: Real-time inventory updates from factory MES systems to central ERP
useCases.dontUse: Nightly batch file extracts where latency is acceptable and volume is low

useCases.use: Order lifecycle events published for multi-system consumption (logistics, billing, CRM)
useCases.dontUse: Simple request-response queries where synchronous REST is sufficient

useCases.use: IoT sensor events from production lines feeding quality analytics
useCases.dontUse: Human-initiated CRUD operations on master data with immediate consistency needs

components: Azure Event Hubs — high-throughput event ingestion with partitioned consumers
Azure Service Bus — enterprise messaging with topics, sessions, and DLQ
Azure Functions — event processors and subscriber handlers
Azure Event Grid — system event routing and webhook delivery
Azure Cosmos DB — event store for idempotency tracking and replay
interactionSteps: Producer publishes domain event with unique correlation ID to Event Hubs or Service Bus topic
Event Hubs partitions events by key (e.g., plant code or order ID) for ordered processing
Consumer groups process events independently at their own rate
Subscriber checks idempotency store in Cosmos DB before processing to prevent duplicates
Failed events are routed to Dead Letter Queue after configurable retry attempts
DLQ monitor Azure Function alerts operations team and enables manual replay
Event Grid publishes system lifecycle events for infrastructure automation
securityConsiderations: All event payloads containing PII must be encrypted at the field level before publishing
Event Hub and Service Bus connections must use managed identity, not connection strings
Dead Letter Queues must have restricted access — only operations team can read/replay
Event schemas must be registered in a schema registry to prevent breaking changes
Consumer applications must validate event schema version before processing

guardrails.rule: All event consumers must implement idempotent processing
Dead Letter Queues must be configured with alerting for all subscriptions
PII fields in event payloads must be encrypted or tokenized
All event schemas must be registered in the central schema registry
Event processing latency SLO must be defined per consumer

exceptionProcess: Submit Integration Architecture Board request for synchronous integration exceptions. Must include failure mode analysis, SLA impact assessment, and compensating retry strategy.

revisionHistory.author: David Okonkwo
revisionHistory.summary: Initial event-driven pattern with Event Hubs

revisionHistory.author: David Okonkwo
revisionHistory.summary: Added Service Bus DLQ handling and idempotency guidance

revisionHistory.author: David Okonkwo
revisionHistory.summary: Added schema registry, field-level encryption, and Cosmos DB idempotency store

diagramSvg:
<svg width="900" height="600" viewBox="0 0 900 600" font-family="system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
  <defs>
    <marker id="arr" markerWidth="8" markerHeight="8" refX="7" refY="3" orient="auto">
      <path d="M0,0 L0,6 L8,3 z" fill="#1B3A6B"/>
    </marker>
    <marker id="arrt" markerWidth="8" markerHeight="8" refX="7" refY="3" orient="auto">
      <path d="M0,0 L0,6 L8,3 z" fill="#0F6E56"/>
    </marker>
    <marker id="arra" markerWidth="8" markerHeight="8" refX="7" refY="3" orient="auto">
      <path d="M0,0 L0,6 L8,3 z" fill="#BA7517"/>
    </marker>
  </defs>

  <!-- Background -->
  <rect width="900" height="600" fill="#EAF1FB"/>

  <!-- Title Bar -->
  <rect width="900" height="44" fill="#1B3A6B" rx="0"/>
  <text x="20" y="16" fill="white" font-size="11" font-weight="600" opacity="0.7">Application & Integration · Layer 2 — Logical</text>
  <text x="20" y="33" fill="white" font-size="15" font-weight="700">Event-Driven Integration</text>

  <!-- Producers label -->
  <rect x="20" y="58" width="100" height="24" rx="4" fill="#1B3A6B" opacity="0.15"/>
  <text x="70" y="74" fill="#1B3A6B" font-size="11" font-weight="700" text-anchor="middle">Producers</text>

  <!-- Producer box -->
  <rect x="20" y="88" width="130" height="50" rx="8" fill="white" stroke="#1B3A6B" stroke-width="1.5"/>
  <text x="85" y="108" fill="#1B3A6B" font-size="11" font-weight="700" text-anchor="middle">Domain Events</text>
  <text x="85" y="124" fill="#64748b" font-size="10" text-anchor="middle">+ Correlation ID</text>

  <!-- Step 1 arrow -->
  <line x1="150" y1="113" x2="230" y2="160" stroke="#1B3A6B" stroke-width="1.5" marker-end="url(#arr)"/>
  <text x="178" y="143" fill="#1B3A6B" font-size="10">1</text>

  <!-- Event Hubs -->
  <rect x="230" y="140" width="150" height="54" rx="8" fill="white" stroke="#1B3A6B" stroke-width="2"/>
  <rect x="230" y="140" width="150" height="20" rx="8" fill="#1B3A6B"/>
  <rect x="230" y="152" width="150" height="8" fill="#1B3A6B"/>
  <text x="305" y="155" fill="white" font-size="11" font-weight="700" text-anchor="middle">Azure Event Hubs</text>
  <text x="305" y="177" fill="#64748b" font-size="10" text-anchor="middle">Partitioned Ingestion</text>
  <text x="305" y="190" fill="#64748b" font-size="10" text-anchor="middle">Consumer Groups</text>

  <!-- Step 1b arrow to Service Bus -->
  <line x1="150" y1="113" x2="230" y2="270" stroke="#1B3A6B" stroke-width="1.5" marker-end="url(#arr)"/>

  <!-- Service Bus -->
  <rect x="230" y="248" width="150" height="54" rx="8" fill="white" stroke="#0F6E56" stroke-width="2"/>
  <rect x="230" y="248" width="150" height="20" rx="8" fill="#0F6E56"/>
  <rect x="230" y="260" width="150" height="8" fill="#0F6E56"/>
  <text x="305" y="263" fill="white" font-size="11" font-weight="700" text-anchor="middle">Azure Service Bus</text>
  <text x="305" y="285" fill="#64748b" font-size="10" text-anchor="middle">Topics / Sessions</text>
  <text x="305" y="298" fill="#64748b" font-size="10" text-anchor="middle">Dead Letter Queue</text>

  <!-- Step 2/3 arrows to Azure Functions -->
  <line x1="380" y1="167" x2="480" y2="200" stroke="#1B3A6B" stroke-width="1.5" marker-end="url(#arr)"/>
  <text x="418" y="189" fill="#1B3A6B" font-size="10">2,3</text>
  <line x1="380" y1="272" x2="480" y2="240" stroke="#0F6E56" stroke-width="1.5" marker-end="url(#arrt)"/>
  <text x="418" y="258" fill="#0F6E56" font-size="10">3</text>

  <!-- Azure Functions -->
  <rect x="480" y="190" width="150" height="54" rx="8" fill="white" stroke="#1B3A6B" stroke-width="2"/>
  <rect x="480" y="190" width="150" height="20" rx="8" fill="#1B3A6B"/>
  <rect x="480" y="202" width="150" height="8" fill="#1B3A6B"/>
  <text x="555" y="205" fill="white" font-size="11" font-weight="700" text-anchor="middle">Azure Functions</text>
  <text x="555" y="227" fill="#64748b" font-size="10" text-anchor="middle">Event Processors</text>
  <text x="555" y="240" fill="#64748b" font-size="10" text-anchor="middle">Subscriber Handlers</text>

  <!-- Step 4 arrow to Cosmos DB -->
  <line x1="630" y1="217" x2="700" y2="217" stroke="#1B3A6B" stroke-width="1.5" marker-end="url(#arr)"/>
  <text x="655" y="212" fill="#1B3A6B" font-size="10">4</text>

  <!-- Cosmos DB -->
  <rect x="700" y="190" width="150" height="54" rx="8" fill="white" stroke="#0F6E56" stroke-width="2"/>
  <rect x="700" y="190" width="150" height="20" rx="8" fill="#0F6E56"/>
  <rect x="700" y="202" width="150" height="8" fill="#0F6E56"/>
  <text x="775" y="205" fill="white" font-size="11" font-weight="700" text-anchor="middle">Azure Cosmos DB</text>
  <text x="775" y="227" fill="#64748b" font-size="10" text-anchor="middle">Idempotency Store</text>
  <text x="775" y="240" fill="#64748b" font-size="10" text-anchor="middle">Event Replay</text>

  <!-- Step 5 DLQ arrow -->
  <line x1="380" y1="295" x2="480" y2="350" stroke="#BA7517" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-dasharray="5,3" marker-end="url(#arra)"/>
  <text x="415" y="330" fill="#BA7517" font-size="10">5 DLQ</text>

  <!-- DLQ Monitor Function -->
  <rect x="480" y="330" width="150" height="54" rx="8" fill="white" stroke="#BA7517" stroke-width="2"/>
  <rect x="480" y="330" width="150" height="20" rx="8" fill="#BA7517"/>
  <rect x="480" y="342" width="150" height="8" fill="#BA7517"/>
  <text x="555" y="345" fill="white" font-size="11" font-weight="700" text-anchor="middle">DLQ Monitor Fn</text>
  <text x="555" y="367" fill="#64748b" font-size="10" text-anchor="middle">Alert + Replay</text>
  <text x="555" y="380" fill="#64748b" font-size="10" text-anchor="middle">Step 6</text>

  <!-- Event Grid -->
  <rect x="700" y="330" width="150" height="54" rx="8" fill="white" stroke="#1B3A6B" stroke-width="2"/>
  <rect x="700" y="330" width="150" height="20" rx="8" fill="#1B3A6B"/>
  <rect x="700" y="342" width="150" height="8" fill="#1B3A6B"/>
  <text x="775" y="345" fill="white" font-size="11" font-weight="700" text-anchor="middle">Azure Event Grid</text>
  <text x="775" y="367" fill="#64748b" font-size="10" text-anchor="middle">System Events</text>
  <text x="775" y="380" fill="#64748b" font-size="10" text-anchor="middle">Webhook Delivery</text>

  <!-- Step 7 arrow -->
  <line x1="630" y1="357" x2="698" y2="357" stroke="#1B3A6B" stroke-width="1.5" marker-end="url(#arr)"/>
  <text x="655" y="350" fill="#1B3A6B" font-size="10">7</text>

  <!-- Related Patterns -->
  <text x="20" y="450" fill="#1B3A6B" font-size="11" font-weight="700">Related Patterns</text>
  <rect x="20" y="460" width="220" height="44" rx="8" fill="none" stroke="#1B3A6B" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-dasharray="6,3"/>
  <text x="30" y="478" fill="#1B3A6B" font-size="11" font-weight="600">AP-005</text>
  <text x="75" y="478" fill="#1e293b" font-size="11">Saga & Distributed Txn</text>
  <text x="30" y="494" fill="#64748b" font-size="10">Enables</text>

  <rect x="260" y="460" width="220" height="44" rx="8" fill="none" stroke="#0F6E56" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-dasharray="6,3"/>
  <text x="270" y="478" fill="#0F6E56" font-size="11" font-weight="600">IN-002</text>
  <text x="315" y="478" fill="#1e293b" font-size="11">Connector Isolation</text>
  <text x="270" y="494" fill="#64748b" font-size="10">Uses</text>

  <!-- Legend -->
  <rect x="620" y="450" width="260" height="90" rx="6" fill="white" stroke="#64748b" stroke-width="1" opacity="0.9"/>
  <text x="750" y="468" fill="#1e293b" font-size="11" font-weight="700" text-anchor="middle">Legend</text>
  <line x1="635" y1="482" x2="665" y2="482" stroke="#1B3A6B" stroke-width="1.5" marker-end="url(#arr)"/>
  <text x="672" y="486" fill="#1e293b" font-size="10">Event / Message Flow</text>
  <line x1="635" y1="500" x2="665" y2="500" stroke="#BA7517" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-dasharray="5,3" marker-end="url(#arra)"/>
  <text x="672" y="504" fill="#1e293b" font-size="10">Error / DLQ Route</text>
  <line x1="635" y1="518" x2="665" y2="518" stroke="#0F6E56" stroke-width="1.5" marker-end="url(#arrt)"/>
  <text x="672" y="522" fill="#1e293b" font-size="10">Idempotency Check</text>

  <!-- Footer -->
  <text x="450" y="590" fill="#64748b" font-size="10" text-anchor="middle">McCain Foods · Event-Driven Integration · IN-001 · Tier: Layer 2 Logical</text>
</svg>
